blocks.content: Armin recalled those days.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Losing sight is like losing space. Without space, time disappears too. In the darkness, I realized: I had already transcended time. Thus, Stop magic was born.
Shirone's heart raced. He was hearing the secrets of Stop magic, a feat few had achieved.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Don't be too impressed. It's not transcendent. It only works within Spirit Zone's range and has many limitations.
Armin looked at the frozen Siena.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: She's a good sister. Tough on the outside, tender inside. Do you agree?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haha! I'm not sure about tender, but she's definitely great.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: How does she look to you now? Is my sister beautiful?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: O-of course. She's popular at school.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Then what if? In stopped time, could we do something… inappropriate?
Understanding, Shirone blushed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What are you saying? You're not suggesting…

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Don't worry. It's impossible. Our mass is near zero. Without mass, we'd disintegrate. The point is acceleration. That's why Stop is called the realm of light-speed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's why Neid felt solid. No mass means even clothes can't be wrinkled.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Exactly. We're infinitely fragile. But no one can touch us either. That's Stop's true purpose. You asked how I knew you'd notice? Simple. I've had the same realization as you.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The same realization… You mean?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Yes. The Immortal Function.
Shirone's heart pounded. Here was someone who had experienced the Immortal Function firsthand—a top-tier time mage.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The Immortal Function is the realization of essence. Since essence is singular, our wavelengths resonate. Some call it the eerie sensation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is the Immortal Function?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The gateway to infinity. You've opened it. In magic society, such individuals are called Unlockers.
After a pause, Armin asked.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: When you opened the Immortal Function, did you feel your ego dissolving?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes! I thought I was disappearing.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: You would have, if it continued. When the mind transcends numbers, Spirit Zone expands infinitely. But humans are finite. So Unlockers use their unique Spirit Zone to contain infinity.
Shirone grimaced.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Then what should I do? Even top mages are cautious, but I knew nothing. Now I have nightmares and feel that eerie sensation alone.
